offer: For property managers processing 10-20 rental units/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate rent reconciliation reports instead of manual spreadsheets and calculations.
problem: Manual reconciliation of rent payments leads to errors and delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers seeking solutions
Share insights on Indie Hackers related to property management
Direct message outreach to property managers with demo video
Engage in community forums discussing property management tools
try_it: Let users try user-friendly dashboard and email notifications for discrepancies on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 interviews with target users for feedback
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Set default reminder schedules for tasks
Enable CSV import for existing data
Streamline onboarding process for new users
